channel.title: Kms on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Kms on Steve Dong - A System Administrator's Blog

item.title: How to Build a Kms Server
item.description: How to build a kms server docker mode docker pull luodaoyi/kms-server docker run -itd -p 1688:1688 --name kms luodaoyi/kms-server docker update --restart=always $dockername docker compose docker-compose.yml version:'3'services:frontend:image:luodaoyi/kms-servercontainer_name:mykmsports:-1688:1688restart:always docker-compose start the container docker-compose up -d Reference blog
